name: Guangu of the Steppe
description:
This large drum is made of hardwood and horse hide, with white silhouettes of coursing stallions along its circumference. This drum grants you a +1 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

Activate—The Hammer of Hooves 2 (auditory, concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You hammer a thundering beat on the guangu. For 10 minutes, mounted allies within a gain a +10-foot status bonus to their mount's Speeds. They also gain a +1 status bonus to Nature checks to Command an Animal and automatically succeed when they Command an Animal they're mounted on to take a move action (such as Stride).
